label: Beginner
description: First year of study. Reading in C position, simple rhythms, basic dynamics. Hands mostly separate or in parallel motion.

label: Early Intermediate
description: Expanding hand positions, sharps/flats, I-IV-V7 chords, pedaling, 8th-note patterns. Both hands independent.

label: Intermediate
description: Key signatures to 2 sharps/flats, scales, arpeggios, syncopation, more complex rhythms. Musical expression and phrasing.

label: Late Intermediate
description: All major/minor keys, ornaments, extended chords, varied articulations. Longer and more demanding pieces.

label: Early Advanced
description: Advanced technique, complex rhythms, extended repertoire. Concert-level preparation.

label: Advanced
description: Professional-level repertoire. Full mastery of technique and musical interpretation required.
